name: INEOS Styrolution India Limited
summary: INEOS Styrolution India Limited is a leading manufacturer of styrenics, including acrylonitrile butadiene styrene (ABS), polystyrene (PS), and styrene acrylonitrile (SAN) in India. The company serves various industries such as automotive, household appliances, and packaging. INEOS Styrolution India Limited is headquartered in Vadodara, Gujarat, India.
